name: XCF Global, Inc.
business: XCF Global, Inc. produces sustainable aviation fuel (SAF) and other renewable fuels such as renewable diesel and bio-based glycerol from waste- and residue-based feedstocks. The company sells its products primarily under a supply and offtake agreement with Phillips 66, and intends to sell to airlines, energy companies, fuel wholesalers, brokers, and fixed-based operators.

exposures.sentence: XCF is committed to reducing the world’s carbon footprint by meeting the growing demand for renewable fuels and will concentrate on the production of clean-burning, sustainable biofuels, principally SAF.

catalysts.event: Resumption of SAF production at nameplate capacity at New Rise Reno
catalysts.sentence: We currently expect to meet SAF production at nameplate capacity as early as the second quarter of 2026

catalysts.event: New Rise Reno 2 SAF production coming online
catalysts.sentence: A second facility that we intend to build in Reno, Nevada, adjacent to New Rise Reno (New Rise Reno 2), is currently expected to come online in 2028.

catalysts.event: Completion of remaining share issuance to EEME
catalysts.sentence: The issuance and sale to EEME of the remaining 31,000,000 shares of Common Stock is expected to be consummated periodically during the period ending during the week of March 31, 2026
